description: Kode perusahaan untuk penomoran, mis. CMI.
label: Code (for numbering)
name: Company-custom_company_code

description: Mata uang tampilan Invoice Print Out. IDR = versi IDR (nilai kurs); selain IDR = versi mata uang invoice. Kosong = currency invoice.
label: Print As Currency
name: Sales Invoice-custom_print_as_currency

description: Alamat customer untuk invoice ini (dipakai Invoice Print Out).
label: Customer Address
name: Sales Invoice-custom_customer_address

description: Tanda tangan Invoice Print Out. Kosong = teks COMPUTER GENERATED DOCUMENT; pilih user untuk tanda tangan bernama.
label: Printed By
name: Sales Invoice-custom_printed_by

description: Pilih sumber dulu (Packing List / Shipping List); nomor BL terisi otomatis.
label: BL No
name: Sales Invoice-custom_bl_no

description: Tarik Expense Note (Validated) milik supplier ini. Baris References (Journal Entry) dibuat otomatis saat Save.
label: Expense Notes
name: Payment Entry-custom_expense_notes

description: Tampilkan kembali Master Job (Shipping/Packing List) yang sudah punya invoice, beserta semua containernya.
label: Re Use Master Job
name: Sales Invoice-custom_reuse_master_job

description: Bayar/terima langsung ke akun (tanpa Supplier/Customer dan tanpa tarikan transaksi). Isi tabel Items di bawah.
label: Expense / Income
name: Payment Entry-custom_direct

description: Nama penerima/pengirim (teks bebas) untuk mode Expense / Income.
label: Pay To
name: Payment Entry-custom_payto
